fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Wave hello with one arm"
"Do a graceful bow"
"Strike a T-pose stance"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Simulate walking on uneven terrain"
"Test balance when pushed gently"
"Explore how the robot settles into a natural standing pose"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a virtual object for the robot to pick up"
"Create a simple obstacle course scene"
"Experiment with different gravity settings"
